name: AP Physics C: Electricity and Magnetism

sections.name: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section I: Multiple Choice — 40 Questions — 80 minutes — 50% of exam. Questions are either discrete questions or question sets, in which students may be provided with a stimulus or a set of data and a series of related questions.

sections.name: Free Response
sections.quote: Section II: Free Response — 4 Questions — 100 minutes — 50% of exam. The section includes one question each of the following categories: Mathematical routines; Translation between representations; Experimental design and analysis; Qualitative/quantitative translation.
